RT by @marekh69: Very early ALPHA!!!
$TOGGLE Airdrop [DEPIN]
Like $Grass !!

1. Sign Up & Get Started
Register at https://toggle.pro/sign-up/33bd8380-87cc-4f3f-a54a-ee562c4e211d and download the node extension to kickstart your mining adventure.

2. Verify Your Email
Confirm your email address to secure your account and ensure you receive all important updates.

3. Install the Extension
Head over to the Chrome Web Store and add the Toggle Extension to your browser: Toggle Extension.

4. Start Mining
Log in to the extension, begin mining, then visit your dashboard to connect your device for seamless integration.

RT for others
